[et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" custom_padding_tablet="||0px||false|false" custom_padding_phone="||0px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_heading title="The Way We Do Things" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" title_level="h2" title_font="|600|||||||" title_text_align="center" title_font_size="50px" title_font_size_tablet="44px" title_font_size_phone="34px" title_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_heading][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_3,1_3,1_3" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][dipl_image_card title="Initial Consultation & Design Brief" image="https://diviplus.io/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/dpa-accountant-discussionwebp.webp?_t=1732098414" content_bg_color="#232323" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" title_font="|600||on|||||" title_text_color="#FFFFFF" title_font_size="18px" title_line_height="1.5em" content_text_color="#FFFFFF" content_font_size="16px" hover_transition_duration="450ms" hover_transition_speed_curve="ease-in-out" global_colors_info="{}" transform_styles__hover_enabled="on|hover" transform_scale__hover_enabled="on|hover" transform_translate__hover_enabled="on|desktop" transform_rotate__hover_enabled="on|desktop" transform_skew__hover_enabled="on|desktop" transform_origin__hover_enabled="on|desktop" transform_scale__hover="110%|110%"]

We begin by discussing your vision, preferences, and lifestyle needs, So we can plan accordingly This includes understanding your aesthetic preferences, budget, and the functional requirements of each space in your home.

[/dipl_image_card][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][dipl_image_card title="Concept Development & Design Presentation" image="https://diviplus.io/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/achievement-american-analysis-brainstorming.webp?_t=1732100508" content_bg_color="#232323" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" title_font="|600||on|||||" title_text_color="#FFFFFF" title_font_size="18px" title_line_height="1.5em" content_text_color="#FFFFFF" content_font_size="16px" transform_scale="110%|110%" transform_scale_tablet="100%|100%" transform_scale_phone="100%|100%" transform_scale_last_edited="on|tablet" transform_translate_tablet="" transform_translate_phone="" transform_translate_last_edited="on|tablet" transform_rotate_tablet="" transform_rotate_phone="" transform_rotate_last_edited="on|tablet" transform_skew_tablet="" transform_skew_phone="" transform_skew_last_edited="on|tablet" transform_origin_tablet="" transform_origin_phone="" transform_origin_last_edited="on|tablet" transform_styles_last_edited="on|tablet" hover_transition_duration="450ms" hover_transition_speed_curve="ease-in-out" transform_styles_tablet="" transform_styles_phone="" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}" transform_styles__hover_enabled="off|hover" transform_scale__hover_enabled="off|hover" transform_translate__hover_enabled="off|hover" transform_rotate__hover_enabled="off|hover" transform_skew__hover_enabled="off|hover" transform_origin__hover_enabled="off|hover"]

Based on the consultation, we create a customized design concept, including layout plans, color schemes, furniture selections, and decor. We present this concept to you for feedback and refinement to ensure it aligns with your vision.

[/dipl_image_card][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" global_colors_info="{}"][dipl_image_card title="Execution & Final Styling" image="https://diviplus.io/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/dpar-mansion-property-living-room-room-interior-design.webp?_t=1732101009" content_bg_color="#232323" _builder_version="4.27.3" _module_preset="default" title_font="|600||on|||||" title_text_color="#FFFFFF" title_font_size="18px" title_line_height="1.5em" content_text_color="#FFFFFF" content_font_size="16px" hover_transition_duration="450ms" hover_transition_speed_curve="ease-in-out" locked="off" global_colors_info="{}" transform_styles__hover_enabled="on|hover" transform_scale__hover_enabled="on|hover" transform_translate__hover_enabled="on|desktop" transform_rotate__hover_enabled="on|desktop" transform_skew__hover_enabled="on|desktop" transform_origin__hover_enabled="on|desktop" transform_scale__hover="110%|110%"]

Once the design is approved, we oversee the sourcing, procurement, and installation of furniture, fixtures, and decor. The final touches are added to ensure your home reflects the design vision, creating a stylish and functional space.

[/dipl_image_card][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
